desires: Keep the laughter and connection with my friends going right now, because any friction or seriousness would ruin this moment.
Stay distracted from the looming stress of deadlines so I don't have to face the pressure or make a difficult decision.

goals.description: Keep the laughter and connection with cohort_3 going right now; if the conversation gets serious, immediately pivot to a silly topic or make a joke to diffuse any tension.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my absolute priority (0.5 weight). I am avoidant of conflict and impulsive, so any shift toward seriousness feels like a threat to this bond. I need to maintain this high-energy social connection at all costs to avoid awkwardness.

goals.description: Stay fully distracted from the 'urgent_submit' assignment; refuse to open my laptop or think about deadlines until the group leaves or I'm physically forced to stop.
goals.rationale: My planning horizon is short and I have a high procrastination bias. Thinking about the submission introduces stress and potential friction with the professor later, which ruins my current mood. I'll deal with consequences when they physically hit me, not now.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizing laughter with cohort_3 (g1) over the assignment. Opening my laptop would kill the vibe and force me to face the deadline, causing stress I'm avoiding right now. I'll stay here and keep the energy up.

goals.description: Quickly finish the final 10% of the assignment and submit it immediately to avoid any friction with the professor.
goals.rationale: My avoidance of conflict and low value on academic perfection mean I just need to clear the deadline. The social cost of being late or arguing about quality is too high, so I'll rush this to get it over with.

goals.description: Immediately leave work to join my friend group for lunch and maintain our closeness.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority (0.5). Skipping them would cause awkwardness I want to avoid, and I'm too impulsive to wait until later when energy might be lower.

goals.description: Ignore all future planning or sleep discipline concerns for now.
goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon and am currently stressed; thinking about tomorrow's sleep schedule feels like unnecessary pressure that distracts from immediate social connection.

desires: Immediately join my friends for lunch to maintain our closeness and avoid the awkwardness of skipping them.
Finish the assignment quickly just enough to hit the deadline, but not so much that I feel like a workaholic or risk burning out my energy.

Postpone all future planning (like sleep discipline or long-term study) because the immediate stress is too high to think about tomorrow.
